---
pagetitle: "Teaching"
---

I teach courses in introductory statistics (e.g. [MF9130](https://www.uio.no/studier/emner/medisin/med/MF9130E/)), survival analysis (e.g. [MF9510](https://www.uio.no/studier/emner/medisin/med/MF9510E/)) and causal inference ([MF9570](https://www.uio.no/studier/emner/medisin/med/MF9570/)) at the Faculty of Medicine, University of Oslo.
